description: A passenger's flight has been cancelled by the airline due to weather. They need to be rebooked.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's original booking details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the affected passenger and flight.

nodes.task_description: Search for the next available flights to the same destination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds alternative flights for the passenger.

nodes.task_description: Rebook the passenger on the next available flight at no additional cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully rebooks the passenger and issues a new ticket.
